name: Rainbow Pride
description: The original LGBTQ+ pride symbol, representing the diversity of the wider queer community.

name: Progress Pride
description: A 2018 redesign that adds black, brown, and trans-flag colors to centre people of color and transgender people within the LGBTQ+ community.

name: Intersex-Inclusive Progress Pride
description: A 2021 update to the Progress flag that adds a purple-on-yellow ring to also include intersex people.

name: Queer
description: An umbrella term used by some people whose gender or sexuality falls outside more specific labels.

name: Gay men (mlm)
description: A man who is romantically or sexually attracted to other men, or more broadly any man-loving-man identity.

name: Lesbian
description: A woman who is romantically or sexually attracted to other women.

name: Bisexual
description: A person who is attracted to people of more than one gender.

name: Pansexual
description: A person who is attracted to people regardless of gender.

name: Polysexual
description: A person who is attracted to multiple, but not necessarily all, genders.

name: Omnisexual
description: A person who is attracted to people of all genders, with gender still playing a role in the attraction.

name: Asexual
description: A person who experiences little to no sexual attraction to others.

name: Graysexual
description: A person who experiences sexual attraction rarely or only under specific circumstances.

name: Demisexual
description: A person who only experiences sexual attraction after forming a deep emotional bond.

name: Aromantic
description: A person who experiences little to no romantic attraction to others.

name: Demiromantic
description: A person who only feels romantic attraction after forming a deep emotional bond.

name: Abrosexual
description: A person whose sexual orientation is fluid and shifts between orientations over time.

name: Polyamory
description: The practice of having multiple consensual, loving relationships at the same time, with the knowledge of everyone involved.

name: Transgender
description: A person whose gender identity differs from the sex they were assigned at birth.

name: Non-binary
description: A person whose gender identity is not exclusively man or woman.

name: Genderqueer
description: A person whose gender identity falls outside or across binary categories of man and woman.

name: Genderfluid
description: A person whose gender identity shifts over time between different gender experiences.

name: Agender
description: A person who does not identify with any gender, or who identifies as gender-neutral.

name: Bigender
description: A person who identifies as two genders, either simultaneously or alternately.

name: Demigender
description: A person who feels a partial but not full connection to a particular gender identity.

name: Neutrois
description: A person who identifies as having a neutral, null, or absent gender.

name: Intersex
description: A person born with sex characteristics that don't fit typical definitions of male or female.

name: Two-Spirit
description: An Indigenous North American term for a person who embodies both masculine and feminine spirits within Indigenous traditions.
